## IUseFillingSlotManagementOptions.productionSelections property

Production-selected fillings per slot (for this run, not recipe edit). If provided, this overrides preferredId for display but doesn't modify the draft.

**Signature:**

```typescript
productionSelections?: Readonly<Record<SlotId, string>>;
```
